feed.title: Fuel Lab Product Feed
feed.description: Live product feed from fuellab.co.za — Energy & Endurance and Hydration & Electrolytes

product.title: 226ers High Fructose Gel
product.description: High Fructose Gel provides a 55 g supply of carbohydrates and 250 mg of sodium per gel from the maltodextrin and fructose, in a proportion of 10:8. This formulation, based on “multiple transportable carbohydrates”, has shown through studies* that during extended exercise, the use of carbohydrates that are absorbed in the intestine by different transporters is the only way to increase the rate of assimilation and oxidation of exogenous carbohydrates above 60 g/hour * To that end, researchers confirm that the ideal thing is to combine sources of carbohydrates. We opted for Maltodextrin, to control molecular weight/osmolarity, the other one being Fructose. MALTODEXTRINE: Is absorbed in the small intestine by the transporter SLG-1 and converted into glucose for delivery to the cells, quickly providing them with energy. This is a high glycaemic index, a rapid rise in blood glucose levels, with instant release of energy. Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolarity, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. FRUCTOSE: Is absorbed in the small intestine using the GLUT5 transporters, different to those that absorb other carbohydrates. The absorbed fructose travels from the intestine to the liver by GLUT2 transporters and tops up the stores of hepatic glycogen lost during intense physical exercise. Gradual absorption occurs, with a steady and progressive release of energy This is why the combination of maltodextrin and fructose enables the digestion and assimilation of high amounts of carbohydrates per hour, reducing the risk of gastric problems.
product.description_html: High Fructose Gel provides a 55 g supply of carbohydrates and 250 mg of sodium per gel from the maltodextrin and fructose, in a proportion of 10:8. This formulation, based on “multiple transportable carbohydrates”, has shown through studies* that during extended exercise, the use of carbohydrates that are absorbed in the intestine by different transporters is the only way to increase the rate of assimilation and oxidation of exogenous carbohydrates above 60 g/hour * To that end, researchers confirm that the ideal thing is to combine sources of carbohydrates. We opted for Maltodextrin, to control molecular weight/osmolarity, the other one being Fructose. MALTODEXTRINE: Is absorbed in the small intestine by the transporter SLG-1 and converted into glucose for delivery to the cells, quickly providing them with energy. This is a high glycaemic index, a rapid rise in blood glucose levels, with instant release of energy. Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolarity, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. FRUCTOSE: Is absorbed in the small intestine using the GLUT5 transporters, different to those that absorb other carbohydrates. The absorbed fructose travels from the intestine to the liver by GLUT2 transporters and tops up the stores of hepatic glycogen lost during intense physical exercise. Gradual absorption occurs, with a steady and progressive release of energy This is why the combination of maltodextrin and fructose enables the digestion and assimilation of high amounts of carbohydrates per hour, reducing the risk of gastric problems.

product.title: 226ers High Energy Gel
product.description: Energy gel with cyclodextrin, natural flavors and a high intake of carbohydrates, 200 Kcal per gel. In nine flavors and with different properties and characteristics. High Energy Gel is an energy gel in which the main source of carbohydrates is cyclodextrin, a cutting-edge carbohydrate that provides improved and more efficient glycogen replenishment. > It provides prolonged energy release, which is ideal during and after exercise. > A lower insulin peak, favouring the use of glucose at cellular level over a shorter timespan while maintaining the blood sugar level for longer. > Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolality, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. > Does not inhibit fat burning. In a 76-g, 200-kcal stick format containing 50 g of carbohydrates per gel unit in a 1:1 ratio for complex and simple carbohydrates. The aromas used are natural and achieve really good flavours: > Pure formule: Lemon, Banana and Neutro (unflavoured). > BCAA: with 1 g of BCAA in an 8:1:1 ratio: Blackcurrant and Orange. > Caffeine: Cherry (160mg de caffeine) and Espresso coffee (80mg de caffeine). > Salty, contain 250mg of sodium and a touch of salt: Strawberry and Peanut&Honey.
product.description_html: Energy gel with cyclodextrin, natural flavors and a high intake of carbohydrates, 200 Kcal per gel. In nine flavors and with different properties and characteristics. High Energy Gel is an energy gel in which the main source of carbohydrates is cyclodextrin, a cutting-edge carbohydrate that provides improved and more efficient glycogen replenishment. > It provides prolonged energy release, which is ideal during and after exercise. > A lower insulin peak, favouring the use of glucose at cellular level over a shorter timespan while maintaining the blood sugar level for longer. > Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolality, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. > Does not inhibit fat burning. In a 76-g, 200-kcal stick format containing 50 g of carbohydrates per gel unit in a 1:1 ratio for complex and simple carbohydrates. The aromas used are natural and achieve really good flavours: > Pure formule: Lemon, Banana and Neutro (unflavoured). > BCAA: with 1 g of BCAA in an 8:1:1 ratio: Blackcurrant and Orange. > Caffeine: Cherry (160mg de caffeine) and Espresso coffee (80mg de caffeine). > Salty, contain 250mg of sodium and a touch of salt: Strawberry and Peanut&Honey.

product.title: Pace & Power EnduraPower
product.description: EnduraPowerEnduraPower! State-of-the art energy and hydration formula for racing/training in African heat.)4 different types of carbohydrate for blood sugar stability throughout!)High in electrolytes, including Magnesium bisglycinate and Kalahari Salt. Malic acid to support energy within the performing muscles and lactate buffers. Safe and effective. Safe for kids. Berry and Tangerine now with PURE Monk Fruit Extract.What is Monk Fruit Extract? (MFE)It is type of melon that grows in the mountains of southern Asia. It tastes sweet and is dark in colour when ripe. The extract has zero calories. Our Monk Fruit Extract is 100% pure! Nothing added. (Berry and Tangerine only)Note because Monk Fruit Extract is dark in colour, it is normal to see dark flecks of the fruit in the powder.)
product.description_html:
EnduraPowerEnduraPower! State-of-the art energy and hydration formula for racing/training in African heat.)

4 different types of carbohydrate for blood sugar stability throughout!)

High in electrolytes, including Magnesium bisglycinate and Kalahari Salt. Malic acid to support energy within the performing muscles and lactate buffers. Safe and effective. Safe for kids. Berry and Tangerine now with PURE Monk Fruit Extract.

What is Monk Fruit Extract? (MFE)

It is type of melon that grows in the mountains of southern Asia. It tastes sweet and is dark in colour when ripe. The extract has zero calories. Our Monk Fruit Extract is 100% pure! Nothing added. (Berry and Tangerine only)

Note because Monk Fruit Extract is dark in colour, it is normal to see dark flecks of the fruit in the powder.)

product.title: 226ers Energy Drink Sub9
product.description: SUB9 ENERGY DRINK. Energy product specially recommended for workouts and competitions lasting more than 4 hours, such as ultra trails, long-distance triathlons, bicycle race routes or mountain biking in stages, among others. This original product provides sufficient carbohydrates to ensure the energy needed for sporting performance, as well as rapid-assimilation proteins and BCAA. 8:1:1 It also provides sodium, the mineral our body most consumes during exercise. SUB9 - ENERGY DRINK contains: > Amylopectin: as a source of energy: - Absorbed by the stomach up to 80% faster - Restores muscle glycogen up to 70% faster. > Whey protein isolate: Numerous studies have shown that the intake of a mix of carbohydrates with high glycaemic indexes such as amylopectin, together with whey protein isolate, improves performance in long duration sports and prolongs time to exhaustion. > BCAA (8.1.1) + Tyrosine: If we increase the intake of branched-chain amino acids such as leucine (8:1:1) and we add tyrosine, we avoid the decrease of neurotransmitter precursors such as dopamine. > Taurine + L-Carnitine: Taurine has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties and increases fat oxidation as an energy substratum, which, together with the carnitine for improving their transport into the mitochondria, promotes the use of the fat maintaining glycogen reserves, which is essential in long-duration sports. They help improve overall health, acting in synergy with the other nutrients.
product.description_html: SUB9 ENERGY DRINK. Energy product specially recommended for workouts and competitions lasting more than 4 hours, such as ultra trails, long-distance triathlons, bicycle race routes or mountain biking in stages, among others. This original product provides sufficient carbohydrates to ensure the energy needed for sporting performance, as well as rapid-assimilation proteins and BCAA. 8:1:1 It also provides sodium, the mineral our body most consumes during exercise. SUB9 - ENERGY DRINK contains: > Amylopectin: as a source of energy: - Absorbed by the stomach up to 80% faster - Restores muscle glycogen up to 70% faster. > Whey protein isolate: Numerous studies have shown that the intake of a mix of carbohydrates with high glycaemic indexes such as amylopectin, together with whey protein isolate, improves performance in long duration sports and prolongs time to exhaustion. > BCAA (8.1.1) + Tyrosine: If we increase the intake of branched-chain amino acids such as leucine (8:1:1) and we add tyrosine, we avoid the decrease of neurotransmitter precursors such as dopamine. > Taurine + L-Carnitine: Taurine has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties and increases fat oxidation as an energy substratum, which, together with the carnitine for improving their transport into the mitochondria, promotes the use of the fat maintaining glycogen reserves, which is essential in long-duration sports. They help improve overall health, acting in synergy with the other nutrients.

product.title: 32Gi Sport Gel
product.description: 32Gi® Sports Gels are created with the consumer in mind. Formulated, as clean as possible, with natural brown rice syrup. On top of a great energy kick, there are added electrolytes to assist with hydration.Fast acting – 21 g of fast-acting carbohydrates to use on the go. 32Gi® Sports Gels help you achieve your fuelling needs for cycling, running - all endurance sports!Pure brown rice syrup - High-Quality Non GMO Brown Rice Syrup, to help deliver smooth energy from start to finish.Tummy friendly - Simple ingredients – including natural flavours and no added colours - make this gel easy to digest. Added sodium – Each sachet contains 59 mg of sodium in the form of real salt, to assist with hydration. Just snap and consume - An innovative and completely unique gel packaging. The product is easy to carry, easy to use, and is more environmentally friendly than conventional packaging. Zero banned saubstances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. Cleaner & certified - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Sports Gels have no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND are gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free
product.description_html:
32Gi® Sports Gels are created with the consumer in mind. Formulated, as clean as possible, with natural brown rice syrup. On top of a great energy kick, there are added electrolytes to assist with hydration.Fast acting – 21 g of fast-acting carbohydrates to use on the go. 32Gi® Sports Gels help you achieve your fuelling needs for cycling, running - all endurance sports!

Pure brown rice syrup - High-Quality Non GMO Brown Rice Syrup, to help deliver smooth energy from start to finish.

Tummy friendly - Simple ingredients – including natural flavours and no added colours - make this gel easy to digest.

Added sodium – Each sachet contains 59 mg of sodium in the form of real salt, to assist with hydration.

Just snap and consume - An innovative and completely unique gel packaging. The product is easy to carry, easy to use, and is more environmentally friendly than conventional packaging.

Zero banned saubstances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.

Cleaner & certified - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Sports Gels have no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND are gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free

product.title: Enduren Energy bar
product.description: Like our other products, we aim to provide the consumer with healthy and superior energy delivery from wholesome natural ingredients. Energy delivery comes from a wide variety of complex carbohydrates present in the raw products and some naturally occurring fructose and glucose from the dates and molasses and some good fat from the sunflower seeds. The fat delivers additional energy over and above the energy delivered by carbohydrates. They are easy to chew and digest, and taste really great. Some naturally occurring protein assists in prevention of muscle breakdown. The bars contain a wide spectrum of naturally occurring trace minerals and vitamins found in the raw ingredients. These assist in athletic performance and strengthening of the immune system and include: Calcium, Iron, Magnesium, Phosphorus, Potassium, Sodium, Zinc, Copper, Manganese, Selenium, Vitamin C, Thiamin, Riboflavin, Niacin, Pantothenic acid, Vitamin B-6, Folate, Folic Acid, Choline, Vitamin E. They are also an excellent option for a healthy snack during a normal work day or breakfast when you are short of time.

The fat delivers additional energy over and above the energy delivered by carbohydrates. They are easy to chew and digest, and taste really great. Some naturally occurring protein assists in prevention of muscle breakdown. The bars contain a wide spectrum of naturally occurring trace minerals and vitamins found in the raw ingredients. product.title: 32Gi Hydrate Tabs
product.description: Zero calorie electrolyte-rich sports drink tablet - Enhanced with electrolytes and bursting with a natural, zero-calorie fruity flavour. Mix with water for a hydrating beverage to keep you powering through your next workout. Enhance your workout - Through improved hydration. Keep a tube in your gym bag, car, purse, hiking pack or anywhere you'll want to mix up a healthy, electrolyte drink. Fortified with vitamin Bs - The Vitamin B fortification of HYDRATE is to aid vitality. Vitamin B12 assists the body in converting carbohydrates into glucose for energy as well as aiding the immune system. Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. Cleaner & certified - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Hydrate has no artificial colours, nature identical flavours, AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free

product.title: Named Sport Race Fuel Bar

This professional bar formula completes the Race Fuel> line with a solid, chewy product (alternative to classic gels). Available in three flavors: Raspberry, Lemon-Lime and Cola-Lime. The Cola Lime flavor is enriched with 80mg of Caffeine per bar.

product.title: High Five Energy Gel Aqua
product.description: Energy Gel Aqua is a refreshing gel that has a consistency more like a sports drink so, unlike many other gels, you don’t need to drink extra water with it. This makes it a good option for beginners who are trying out gels for the first time. Easy to open and swallow, each sachet delivers 23g of carbohydrate energy.

This makes it a good option for beginners who are trying out gels for the first time. Easy to open and swallow, each sachet delivers 23g of carbohydrate energy.

product.title: Pace & Power EnduraShake
product.description: EnduraShake is a liquid endurance MEAL. It is a pre-digested food which is quickly and easily absorbed from the gut.One serving will give you about 3.5-4 hours of racing or training.Great also, if you struggle to eat and then compete!
product.description_html:
EnduraShake is a liquid endurance MEAL. It is a pre-digested food which is quickly and easily absorbed from the gut.

One serving will give you about 3.5-4 hours of racing or training.

Great also, if you struggle to eat and then compete!

product.title: Pace & Power JooBies
product.description: Joobies are brilliant for a fast boost and to stop muscle cramps. They contain electrolytes on a quick-acting transport system to deliver the electrolytes to those cramping, tired muscles fast! They are also great if you need a massive boost!(Note: Joobies are made by hand, so appearance may vary slightly)

product.title: Enduren Protein Bar
product.description: Great tasting Peanut Butter Protein Bar with added Pea Protein. Made from natural ingredients Peanut Butter, Pea Protein, Egg White, Raw Brown Sugar and Glucose. It contains 14g of Protein per bar, is Gluten and Lactose free and is free from any artificial ingredients. Pea Protein is a unique natural, clean and alkaline protein extract that is really in its own class compared to the whey, soy and casein proteins used by other brands in their protein bars. A patented Canadian cold mechanical process ensures no damage to the pea protein and keep enzymes, that assist in digestion, intact. It’s amino acid profile is very close to that of whey protein but without the side effects of whey. It is allowed for use in organic food. For more info on advantages of Pea Protein, read the write up of our Recover Drink. Great as a protein rich snack, a during exercise protein source or after exercise Recovery snack.
product.description_html: Great tasting Peanut Butter Protein Bar with added Pea Protein. Made from natural ingredients Peanut Butter, Pea Protein, Egg White, Raw Brown Sugar and Glucose. It contains 14g of Protein per bar, is Gluten and Lactose free and is free from any artificial ingredients. Pea Protein is a unique natural, clean and alkaline protein extract that is really in its own class compared to the whey, soy and casein proteins used by other brands in their protein bars. A patented Canadian cold mechanical process ensures no damage to the pea protein and keep enzymes, that assist in digestion, intact. It’s amino acid profile is very close to that of whey protein but without the side effects of whey. It is allowed for use in organic food. For more info on advantages of Pea Protein, read the write up of our Recover Drink. Great as a protein rich snack, a during exercise protein source or after exercise Recovery snack.

product.title: 32Gi Recover
product.description: Powerful recovery formula - a protein powered, science-based formula that will speed up your recovery time. Great for all athletes who have pushed a hard or long session - cycling, running, all endurance sports – as well as many more disciplines.20 g clean high-quality plant protein - formulated with pea and rice protein isolates to deliver a fast-digesting experience of protein.Optimal BCCAS (with 3 g leucine) - loaded with amino acids to help with muscle protein synthesis, and overall recovery.Tummy friendly - you can safely use 32Gi® Recover without worrying of bloating up or getting nausea. Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. No artificial additives promise - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Recover has no artificial sweeteners, colours, and flavours, is Palm oil free AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free.
product.description_html:
Powerful recovery formula - a protein powered, science-based formula that will speed up your recovery time. Great for all athletes who have pushed a hard or long session - cycling, running, all endurance sports – as well as many more disciplines.

20 g clean high-quality plant protein - formulated with pea and rice protein isolates to deliver a fast-digesting experience of protein.

Optimal BCCAS (with 3 g leucine) - loaded with amino acids to help with muscle protein synthesis, and overall recovery.

Tummy friendly - you can safely use 32Gi® Recover without worrying of bloating up or getting nausea.

Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.

No artificial additives promise - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Recover has no artificial sweeteners, colours, and flavours, is Palm oil free AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free.

product.title: Pace & Power GT Gel
product.description: A soft, liquid energy gel that is high in electrolytes, designed for athletic performance in African heat!GT Gel is comprised of a blend of carbohydrates for stable blood sugar throughout your race/session. It also contains significant amounts of magnesium glycinate and sodium to prevent dehydration, cramping and hyponatraemia. Green Tea (GT) is included for immune protection and BCAAs to prevent muscle breakdown during extended events.GT Gel is a gel designed in Africa for Africa!
product.description_html:
A soft, liquid energy gel that is high in electrolytes, designed for athletic performance in African heat!

GT Gel is comprised of a blend of carbohydrates for stable blood sugar throughout your race/session. It also contains significant amounts of magnesium glycinate and sodium to prevent dehydration, cramping and hyponatraemia. Green Tea (GT) is included for immune protection and BCAAs to prevent muscle breakdown during extended events.

GT Gel is a gel designed in Africa for Africa!

product.title: High Five Zero Hydration
product.description: ZERO is a refreshing, great tasting sugar free electrolyte drink with zero calories for during exercise and throughout the day. Simply drop the hydration tablet into your bottle to effectively replace the electrolytes lost through sweat.
product.description_html: ZERO is a refreshing, great tasting sugar free electrolyte drink with zero calories for during exercise and throughout the day. Simply drop the hydration tablet into your bottle to effectively replace the electrolytes lost through sweat.

product.title: Enduren Endurance Energy Gel
product.description: What makes our Original Endurance Energy Gel unique is the raw ingredients which collectively contain 7 different carbohydrates with different energy release rates, providing an immediate energy lift when needed without a major dip afterwards. Absorption from the intestines take place via 2 different transporters (GLUT2 and GLUT5), maximizing the amount of carbs your body can absorb per hour. The natural enzymes in the raw honey enable the absorption of naturally occurring fructose even for athletes who battle with fructose from isolated fructose used by other commercial energy gels and carbohydrate drinks. Prebiotics assists with digestion and prevent stomach related side effects. Naturally occurring polyphenols and amino acids enhance alertness, focus and concentration without the need for caffeine. The gel is tasty and very easy to swallow, even without water. The perfect companion for any endurance activity.
product.description_html: What makes our Original Endurance Energy Gel unique is the raw ingredients which collectively contain 7 different carbohydrates with different energy release rates, providing an immediate energy lift when needed without a major dip afterwards. Absorption from the intestines take place via 2 different transporters (GLUT2 and GLUT5), maximizing the amount of carbs your body can absorb per hour. The natural enzymes in the raw honey enable the absorption of naturally occurring fructose even for athletes who battle with fructose from isolated fructose used by other commercial energy gels and carbohydrate drinks. Prebiotics assists with digestion and prevent stomach related side effects. Naturally occurring polyphenols and amino acids enhance alertness, focus and concentration without the need for caffeine. The gel is tasty and very easy to swallow, even without water. The perfect companion for any endurance activity.

product.title: 226ers Recovery Drink
product.description: After exercise it is essential to recover as soon as possible to assimilate the training and be able to perform 100% the next day. Recovery Drink helps Recovery Drink is a recovery shake formulated with amylopectin that comes from potato starch and GRASS FED whey protein concentrate of high biological value, since it comes only from grass-fed cows without the use of antibiotics or hormones. growth, therefore it maintains the biological characteristics of the serum peptides and provides all the essential amino acids necessary for growth and maintenance of physiological functions. Recovery Drink helps to: > Refill glycogen stores thanks to amylopectin, a quality carbohydrate that is easy to assimilate. > Protect and rebuild the muscles after exercise thanks to proteins and amino acids. Recovery Drink contains approximately 40% of the best protein, which is equivalent to taking 20-22 g of protein per serving, which contributes to preserving muscle mass and maintaining bones under normal conditions. It also provides: > L-Arginine AKG (250 mg per shot). > Creatine (1500 mg per dose). > Medium Chain Triglycerides (500 mg per dose). > Golden line

Stay hydrated effortlessly with our Daily Electrolyte Formula—perfect for anyone needing an extra boost throughout the day. Whether you're at work, hitting the gym, or just getting through a busy day, simply mix a sachet into your favorite drink for refreshing, on-the-go hydration. Stay balanced. Stay hydrated.

product.title: 32Gi Cramp Assalt
product.description: Picture this; your energy levels are perfect, and then - utter disappointment - that slows you down. Looking for an ingeniously easy to carry and consume solution that offers anti-cramping support, with predictability and high reliability? Look no further than 32Gi® Cramp Assalt. Scientifically-proven capsicum annuum - Acts as a neuro-muscular trigger (which has been shown to reduce or stop muscle contractions and spasms when they occur). Easy on the stomach – Contains Glutamine to help reduce the risk associated with GI (Gastrointestinal) distress. Packed with 6 power vitamins & minerals – 184 mg Sodium, 69 mg Potassium, 40 mg Magnesium, 28 mg Vitamin C, 20 mg Calcium, and 100 iu Vitamin D3 - per sachet. Maximise fluid absorption - Stay properly hydrated. Cramp Assalt is a simple snap and consume gel, to be taken with water or your favourite 32Gi® Energy Drink. Light, small, easy to carry - And Fits anywhere on the Run, Bike or even a Swim. Patented fast one handed snap pack - Provides for Easy to use and Mess Free consumption Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. Cleaner & certified - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Cramp Assalt has no artificial sweeteners or colours, nature identical flavours, AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free
product.description_html:
Picture this; your energy levels are perfect, and then - utter disappointment - that slows you down. Looking for an ingeniously easy to carry and consume solution that offers anti-cramping support, with predictability and high reliability? Look no further than 32Gi® Cramp Assalt.

Scientifically-proven capsicum annuum - Acts as a neuro-muscular trigger (which has been shown to reduce or stop muscle contractions and spasms when they occur).

Easy on the stomach – Contains Glutamine to help reduce the risk associated with GI (Gastrointestinal) distress.

Packed with 6 power vitamins & minerals – 184 mg Sodium, 69 mg Potassium, 40 mg Magnesium, 28 mg Vitamin C, 20 mg Calcium, and 100 iu Vitamin D3 - per sachet.

Maximise fluid absorption - Stay properly hydrated. Cramp Assalt is a simple snap and consume gel, to be taken with water or your favourite 32Gi® Energy Drink.

Light, small, easy to carry - And Fits anywhere on the Run, Bike or even a Swim.

Patented fast one handed snap pack - Provides for Easy to use and Mess Free consumption

Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.

Cleaner & certified - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Cramp Assalt has no artificial sweeteners or colours, nature identical flavours, AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free

product.title: 32Gi Endure Drink
product.description: Clean, sustained energy - The 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink is designed primarily with a novel carbohydrate, Isomaltulose (PalatinoseTM) which results in a stable and controlled release of glucose. It mitigates energy peaks and troughs and provides a prolonged and sustained supply of energy.PROMOTES FAT OXIDATION (BURN) - Due to 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink’s slow & steady rise in blood sugar, it is the perfect drink to facilitate proper energy source partitioning, allowing for fat store tapping to aid energy requirements.REDUCE FATIGUE & NAUSEA - Unlike high spiking carbohydrates & sugar blends that may flood your system (intensity dependent) causing nausea & fatigue, the 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink provides smaller amounts of glucose over a longer period which may result in less upset to the system.ZERO BANNED SUBSTANCES - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.NO ARTIFICIAL ADDITIVES PROMISE - Rest easy knowing that the 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink has no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND is free of gluten, dairy, soy and GMO
product.description_html:
Clean, sustained energy - The 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink is designed primarily with a novel carbohydrate, Isomaltulose (PalatinoseTM) which results in a stable and controlled release of glucose. It mitigates energy peaks and troughs and provides a prolonged and sustained supply of energy.

PROMOTES FAT OXIDATION (BURN) - Due to 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink’s slow & steady rise in blood sugar, it is the perfect drink to facilitate proper energy source partitioning, allowing for fat store tapping to aid energy requirements.

REDUCE FATIGUE & NAUSEA - Unlike high spiking carbohydrates & sugar blends that may flood your system (intensity dependent) causing nausea & fatigue, the 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink provides smaller amounts of glucose over a longer period which may result in less upset to the system.

ZERO BANNED SUBSTANCES - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.

NO ARTIFICIAL ADDITIVES PROMISE - Rest easy knowing that the 32Gi® Endure Sports Drink has no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND is free of gluten, dairy, soy and GMO

product.title: 226ers Energy Drink
product.description: Energy drink is a gluten-free, lactose-free and sugar-free shake. Containing a mix of Vitamins and Minerals, it covers the body’s need for them during physical effort.Its main advantage lies in its rapid supply of energy to the body without the need for sugars and in its low mineral salt content, which guarantees that the intake of other products containing minerals (gels, snack bars, capsules...) is not prejudicial.It is especially recommended for use in physical exercise and competitions lasting 90’ or more and for carb-loading prior to long lasting competitions.
product.description_html:
Energy drink is a gluten-free, lactose-free and sugar-free shake. Containing a mix of Vitamins and Minerals, it covers the body’s need for them during physical effort.

Its main advantage lies in its rapid supply of energy to the body without the need for sugars and in its low mineral salt content, which guarantees that the intake of other products containing minerals (gels, snack bars, capsules...) is not prejudicial.

It is especially recommended for use in physical exercise and competitions lasting 90’ or more and for carb-loading prior to long lasting competitions.

The recommended drink - for hard effort training and racing.

No artificial additives promise - rest easy knowing that 32gi® race has no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, and is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free.

product.title: 226ers Creatine
product.description: The largest amount of creatine is found in skeletal muscle, primarily in the form of phosphocreatine, which serves to generate energy quickly, but creatine also reduces lactate acidosis, thus delaying fatigue, and it has a restorative effect. The function of creatine monohydrate is to increase phosphocreatine reserves in the muscles so that ATP continues to be produced, providing the energy muscles need to continue working during high-intensity training. It is the perfect supplement in strength training and in long-term activities alike: > It contributes to greater production of muscle torque, to increasing training intensity and to greater working capacity. > This ingredient is clinically proven to help increase muscle strenght and boost lean body mass. > It helps energy reserves and supports muscle building, improving physical performance and working capacity on the fatigue threshold. > It reduces fatigue after physical activity, leading to quicker recovery. > In addition it stretches the attention span and mental performance, improving concentration and the ability to absorb information.
product.description_html: The largest amount of creatine is found in skeletal muscle, primarily in the form of phosphocreatine, which serves to generate energy quickly, but creatine also reduces lactate acidosis, thus delaying fatigue, and it has a restorative effect. The function of creatine monohydrate is to increase phosphocreatine reserves in the muscles so that ATP continues to be produced, providing the energy muscles need to continue working during high-intensity training. It is the perfect supplement in strength training and in long-term activities alike: > It contributes to greater production of muscle torque, to increasing training intensity and to greater working capacity. > This ingredient is clinically proven to help increase muscle strenght and boost lean body mass. > It helps energy reserves and supports muscle building, improving physical performance and working capacity on the fatigue threshold. > It reduces fatigue after physical activity, leading to quicker recovery. > In addition it stretches the attention span and mental performance, improving concentration and the ability to absorb information.

product.title: Science in Sport Beta Fuel Gel
product.description: BETA - the most complete nutrition solution in endurance sport. BETA FUEL Energy gel is a dual source, high-carbohydrate energy gel designed to deliver more energy for athletes undertaking longer sessions.Contains 40g dual-source carbohydrateAdvanced 1:0.8 ratio of maltodextrin and fructoseA superior fuelling solution for exercise > 2 hoursGreater carbohydrate intake of 80-120g per hourWHY CHOOSE?Designed for endurance fuelling40g of dual source carbohydrates per gel in an optimal ratio of 1:0.8 Maltodextrin to FructoseProven to show minimal risk of gastrointestinal discomfortSUGGESTED USEDepending on your sport or event, you should aim to consume 1-3 gels every hour to reach an 80g-120g target intake. Simply tear off the top of the packaging and squeeze the contents into your mouth as and when required
product.description_html:
BETA - the most complete nutrition solution in endurance sport. BETA FUEL Energy gel is a dual source, high-carbohydrate energy gel designed to deliver more energy for athletes undertaking longer sessions.

Contains 40g dual-source carbohydrate

Advanced 1:0.8 ratio of maltodextrin and fructose

A superior fuelling solution for exercise > 2 hours

Greater carbohydrate intake of 80-120g per hour

WHY CHOOSE?

Designed for endurance fuelling

40g of dual source carbohydrates per gel in an optimal ratio of 1:0.8 Maltodextrin to Fructose

Proven to show minimal risk of gastrointestinal discomfort

SUGGESTED USE

Depending on your sport or event, you should aim to consume 1-3 gels every hour to reach an 80g-120g target intake. Simply tear off the top of the packaging and squeeze the contents into your mouth as and when required

product.title: Named Sport Hydrafit Zero
product.description: Refreshing effervescent tablets based on electrolytes and vitamins, in a special ZERO SUGARS, low carb and zero calories formulation. HydraFit> ZERO has been developed, together with professional cycling teams, in order to support electrolyte balance during intense workout. Vitamins B1, B2, B6 contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and support energy-yelding metabolism. Magnesium and Potassium contribute to the normal muscle function.

product.title: Named Sport Isotonic Power Gel
product.description: Liquid isotonic energy gel based on maltodextrins D.E.19. (22g carbohydrate per 60 ml single dose)In any sports practice lasting more than 45 minutes, carbohydrate levels need to be restored in order to maintain a high intensity of exercise, as well as to ensure correct hydration levels. On a physiological level, it is recommended to take an Isotonic PowerGel> approximately every 30-40 minutes to prevent muscle glycogen stores from falling below the performance threshold. The liquid consistency allows it to be taken without the need to add water.
product.description_html: Liquid isotonic energy gel based on maltodextrins D.E.19. product.title: Enduren Endurance Energy Drink Mix
product.description: Enduren Endurance Drink Mix is a high performance completely natural carbohydrate and electrolyte supplement for the serious and recreational athlete. Specifically designed to raise energy levels, enhance endurance, prevent dehydration and aid recovery, it enables you to train effectively, recover better and race faster. The unique blend of multiple natural carbohydrates deliver a stepped energy release (slow, medium and fast release) improving gastric emptying rate and fluid absorption, raising energy levels and stabilising blood sugar during exercise. Mental vitality and concentration is promoted via the supply of glucose, which is a primary brain fuel. Endurance mix is exceptionally palatable, the difference between pure water and Endurance mix (unflavoured) is barely noticeable during strenuous physical exercise, with the effect that it is easy to drink continuously even during long events. The natural composition of Endurance mix prevents the occurrence of allergic reactions like gastro intestinal upset, mucus build-up, tight chest as well as cramping, often caused by additives in sports / endurance /energy drinks.
product.description_html: Enduren Endurance Drink Mix is a high performance completely natural carbohydrate and electrolyte supplement for the serious and recreational athlete. Specifically designed to raise energy levels, enhance endurance, prevent dehydration and aid recovery, it enables you to train effectively, recover better and race faster. The unique blend of multiple natural carbohydrates deliver a stepped energy release (slow, medium and fast release) improving gastric emptying rate and fluid absorption, raising energy levels and stabilising blood sugar during exercise. Mental vitality and concentration is promoted via the supply of glucose, which is a primary brain fuel. Endurance mix is exceptionally palatable, the difference between pure water and Endurance mix (unflavoured) is barely noticeable during strenuous physical exercise, with the effect that it is easy to drink continuously even during long events. The natural composition of Endurance mix prevents the occurrence of allergic reactions like gastro intestinal upset, mucus build-up, tight chest as well as cramping, often caused by additives in sports / endurance /energy drinks.

product.title: Nutricon NanoTech Whey Protein
product.description: Nutricon Nanotech Whey is an entirely unique and perfect blend of Fava Bean Protein Isolate and Whey Protein Concentrate. Unlike whey protein alone, Fava beans are rich in phytonutrients and polyphenols which combat oxidative stress and inflammation, support cardiovascular health through endothelial function support and improvements and even promote and support healthy gut microbiome balance with prebiotic cultures which whey doesn’t meaningfully do alone. Fava beans not only have a complete amino acid profile, they do not contain any concerning estrogenic isoflavones associated with soy based products, and the inclusive antioxidant spectrum of these beans assists greatly in free radical mitigation and reduction. Furthermore, Fava beans have a far greater micronutrient yield over whey protein alone, and contain higher quantities of arginine which have better vasodilatory carry-over, meaning better pumps and cardiac tissue function. Last but not least, Fava beans contain high amounts of L-DOPA; a dopamine precursor with strong neurological benefits.This product contains no added fats and is low carbohydrates which makes it the ideal choice for adding lean muscle-building protein into your diet, without the intrusive whey price points now desecrating the supplement market.Nutricon Nanotech Whey has been scientifically manufactured using low temperature filtration technology which preserves the integrity of the protein and aforementioned constituents. The future is here and there are complimentary whey alternatives- many with exceeding benefits over whey alone, just like NanoTech Whey; the single most revolutionary and first to market in its class.
product.description_html:
Nutricon Nanotech Whey is an entirely unique and perfect blend of Fava Bean Protein Isolate and Whey Protein Concentrate. Unlike whey protein alone, Fava beans are rich in phytonutrients and polyphenols which combat oxidative stress and inflammation, support cardiovascular health through endothelial function support and improvements and even promote and support healthy gut microbiome balance with prebiotic cultures which whey doesn’t meaningfully do alone.

Fava beans not only have a complete amino acid profile, they do not contain any concerning estrogenic isoflavones associated with soy based products, and the inclusive antioxidant spectrum of these beans assists greatly in free radical mitigation and reduction. Furthermore, Fava beans have a far greater micronutrient yield over whey protein alone, and contain higher quantities of arginine which have better vasodilatory carry-over, meaning better pumps and cardiac tissue function. Last but not least, Fava beans contain high amounts of L-DOPA; a dopamine precursor with strong neurological benefits.

This product contains no added fats and is low carbohydrates which makes it the ideal choice for adding lean muscle-building protein into your diet, without the intrusive whey price points now desecrating the supplement market.

Nutricon Nanotech Whey has been scientifically manufactured using low temperature filtration technology which preserves the integrity of the protein and aforementioned constituents.

The future is here and there are complimentary whey alternatives- many with exceeding benefits over whey alone, just like NanoTech Whey; the single most revolutionary and first to market in its class.

product.title: Skratch Labs Energy Chews
product.description: Skratch Labs Energy Chews are an easy and convenient source of carbohydrate to help maintain blood sugar and performance during hard and long workouts. We use slightly more water for an improved texture that makes them easier to chew and only real fruit for flavor, for a clean, natural, and incredible taste. It’s like a gumdrop that’s actually a delicious high-performance fruit-drop.
product.description_html: Skratch Labs Energy Chews are an easy and convenient source of carbohydrate to help maintain blood sugar and performance during hard and long workouts. We use slightly more water for an improved texture that makes them easier to chew and only real fruit for flavor, for a clean, natural, and incredible taste. It’s like a gumdrop that’s actually a delicious high-performance fruit-drop.

product.title: Named Sport Race Fuel
product.description: Exclusive pro-endurance energy blend based on a Triple carbo source combining Cyclodextrins Cluster Dextrin™, Maltodextrin D.E. 19 and Fructose, in ratio 1:0.8 ideal to:Optimize the absorption and oxidation of carbohydrates by the bodyMinimizing the risk of gastrointestinal disordersEnsure an optimal energy source in endurance and high-intensity sport activitiesThe combination of carbohydrates in an isotonic formula is fundamental as the transportation of nutrients across the intestinal wall is a rate limiting factor in carbohydrate oxidation during exercise. Scientific literature reports that the special 1:0.8 ratio is optimal in endurance sports as it fully exploits the oxidation of carbohydrates providing the energy needed to sustain intense performance and reduce fatigue.
product.description_html:
Exclusive pro-endurance energy blend based on a Triple carbo source combining Cyclodextrins Cluster Dextrin™, Maltodextrin D.E. 19 and Fructose, in ratio 1:0.8 ideal to:

Optimize the absorption and oxidation of carbohydrates by the body

Minimizing the risk of gastrointestinal disorders

Ensure an optimal energy source in endurance and high-intensity sport activities

The combination of carbohydrates in an isotonic formula is fundamental as the transportation of nutrients across the intestinal wall is a rate limiting factor in carbohydrate oxidation during exercise. Scientific literature reports that the special 1:0.8 ratio is optimal in endurance sports as it fully exploits the oxidation of carbohydrates providing the energy needed to sustain intense performance and reduce fatigue.

product.title: Named Sport Hydrafit
product.description: HydraFit> is an exclusive blend of mineral salts, maltodextrin and vitamins that has been specially created into a hypotonic electrolyte drink. (Osmolarity 190 mOsm/l). HydraFit> is the ideal solution for replacing the mineral salts lost by the body due to excessive sweating during intense exercise. Magnesium and potassium proper muscle functions and reduce the effects of fatigue. Magnesium and potassium proper muscle functions and reduce the effects of fatigue.

product.title: High Five Energy Gummies
product.description: Keeping energy levels high is important for any endurance exercise, to maintain performance and feel better for longer. Full of both flavour and energy1, these pocket size chews help you make the most out of your activity and keep you at your best for longer. Keeping energy levels high is important for any endurance exercise, to maintain performance and feel better for longer. Full of both flavour and energy1, these pocket size chews help you make the most out of your activity and keep you at your best for longer.

Each resealable pouch contains six individual tasty gummies, which can be taken as and when they are needed. Just tuck a pouch of gummies into your pocket for those shorter distances or use them to top up your energy levels between gels.

product.description: Our C90 High Carb Drink Mix is the ultimate fluid fuel and hydration source for long-course athletes around the world. product.title: NeverSecond C30 Energy Gel
product.description: Our C30 Energy Gels are widely considered to be the next evolution of energy gels. Formulated using a 2:1 glucose-to-fructose carbohydrate blend, our C30 gels deliver 30g of fast-absorbing carbohydrate and 200mg of sodium, with an exceptionally low risk of gastrointestinal distress. C30 Energy Gels are the Official Energy Gel of the Leadville Race Series.
product.description_html: Our C30 Energy Gels are widely considered to be the next evolution of energy gels. Formulated using a 2:1 glucose-to-fructose carbohydrate blend, our C30 gels deliver 30g of fast-absorbing carbohydrate and 200mg of sodium, with an exceptionally low risk of gastrointestinal distress. C30 Energy Gels are the Official Energy Gel of the Leadville Race Series.

product.title: NeverSecond C30 Sports Drink Mix
product.description: Our C30 Sports Drink is a modular carbohydrate and electrolyte drink mix that you can personalize based on your training and racing needs. Simply add 1, 2 or 3 scoops into 500ml (16.9 fl. oz.) or 750ml (22.5 fl. oz.) of water. A modular lightly flavored 2:1 glucose-to-fructose drink mix that delivers 30g of carbohydrate and 200mg of sodium per scoop, C30 Sports Drink contains only what you need, in precise proportion, for optimal performance.
product.description_html: Our C30 Sports Drink is a modular carbohydrate and electrolyte drink mix that you can personalize based on your training and racing needs. Simply add 1, 2 or 3 scoops into 500ml (16.9 fl. oz.) or 750ml (22.5 fl. oz.) of water. A modular lightly flavored 2:1 glucose-to-fructose drink mix that delivers 30g of carbohydrate and 200mg of sodium per scoop, C30 Sports Drink contains only what you need, in precise proportion, for optimal performance.

product.title: Enduren Endurance Energy Gel with caffeine
product.description: The plant based raw ingredients collectively contain 5 different carbohydrates with different energy release rates, providing an immediate energy lift when needed without a major dip afterwards. The multiple transportable carbohydrates are absorbed from the intestines via 2 different transporters (GLUT2 and GLUT5), maximizing the amount of carbs your body can absorb. Amino acids and Caffeine enhance alertness, focus, concentration, exercise performance and reduces muscle damage during exercise. The gel is tasty and very easy to swallow, even without water. The perfect companion for any endurance activity. Note: Be aware of Caffeine overuse: Current consensus indicate caffeine can be part of a healthy diet for most people, but too much caffeine may pose a danger to your health. Discuss with your healthcare practitioner.

product.title: 226ers Hydra Zero
product.description: Hydrazero is an essential mineral salt hypotonic drink as the loss of electrolytes has to be replenished in order to perform efficiently not only in competitions but also in training.It should particularly be consumed while training or competing as a form of hydration, recuperating the levels of mineral salts after physical exercise or replenishing mineral salts stores before trainings or competitions.
product.description_html:
Hydrazero is an essential mineral salt hypotonic drink as the loss of electrolytes has to be replenished in order to perform efficiently not only in competitions but also in training.

It should particularly be consumed while training or competing as a form of hydration, recuperating the levels of mineral salts after physical exercise or replenishing mineral salts stores before trainings or competitions.

product.description: Tired of protein shakes? product.title: Nutricon Boost: Energy and Performance Enhancer
product.description: Introducing “BOOST: The Ultimate Energy and Performance Enhancer.” This remarkable formula combines a powerful blend of natural ingredients to amplify your energy levels and optimize your overall performance. With Siberian Ginseng, Rhodiola Rosea, L-Arginine HCL, Beta Alanine, ZMA, and a comprehensive range of B-vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B12), BOOST is designed to supercharge your day.Siberian Ginseng has been used for centuries to combat fatigue and enhance stamina, while Rhodiola Rosea aids in stress reduction and promotes mental clarity. L-Arginine HCL increases nitric oxide production, supporting enhanced blood flow and oxygen delivery to muscles during workouts. Beta Alanine improves endurance and reduces muscle fatigue, enabling you to push through the toughest challenges.Additionally, Nutricon BOOST contains ZMA, a powerful combination of zinc, magnesium, and vitamin B6 that supports muscle recovery, enhances immune function, and improves sleep quality. Combined with a comprehensive spectrum of B-vitamins, including B1, B2, B3, B5, and B12, this formula helps convert food into energy, boosts metabolism, and supports nerve function.With Nutricon BOOST, you can unlock your full potential, whether you’re crushing intense workouts, staying focused at work, or simply needing an energy boost to tackle daily activities. Elevate your energy levels, enhance endurance, and experience peak performance with BOOST today!
product.description_html:
Introducing “BOOST: The Ultimate Energy and Performance Enhancer.” This remarkable formula combines a powerful blend of natural ingredients to amplify your energy levels and optimize your overall performance. With Siberian Ginseng, Rhodiola Rosea, L-Arginine HCL, Beta Alanine, ZMA, and a comprehensive range of B-vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B12), BOOST is designed to supercharge your day.

Siberian Ginseng has been used for centuries to combat fatigue and enhance stamina, while Rhodiola Rosea aids in stress reduction and promotes mental clarity. L-Arginine HCL increases nitric oxide production, supporting enhanced blood flow and oxygen delivery to muscles during workouts. Beta Alanine improves endurance and reduces muscle fatigue, enabling you to push through the toughest challenges.

Additionally, Nutricon BOOST contains ZMA, a powerful combination of zinc, magnesium, and vitamin B6 that supports muscle recovery, enhances immune function, and improves sleep quality. With Nutricon BOOST, you can unlock your full potential, whether you’re crushing intense workouts, staying focused at work, or simply needing an energy boost to tackle daily activities. Elevate your energy levels, enhance endurance, and experience peak performance with BOOST today!

product.title: Nutricon Absolute Amino (EAAs)
product.description: Why use Absolute Aminos?Absolute Aminos have been formulated to help reduce muscle recovery time, while offering sustained energy and muscle-building properties.There are 20 amino acids, with 9 considered essential for muscle rebuilding. These 9 essential amino acids are crucial for constructing new tissue and aiding muscle repair. Since the body cannot synthesize them, they must be obtained through diet and supplementation.Our formula includes AstraGin®, a natural compound known to enhance nutrient absorption, ensuring that your body effectively utilizes these essential amino acids. AstraGin® has been clinically shown to increase the absorption of amino acids, making Absolute Amino more effective in supporting muscle recovery and growth.By incorporating AstraGin®, Absolute Amino not only delivers the necessary amino acids but also ensures they are absorbed efficiently, providing maximum benefits. Experience faster recovery times, sustained energy, and optimal muscle-building support with Absolute Amino.
product.description_html:
Why use Absolute Aminos?

Absolute Aminos have been formulated to help reduce muscle recovery time, while offering sustained energy and muscle-building properties.

There are 20 amino acids, with 9 considered essential for muscle rebuilding. These 9 essential amino acids are crucial for constructing new tissue and aiding muscle repair. Since the body cannot synthesize them, they must be obtained through diet and supplementation.

Our formula includes AstraGin®, a natural compound known to enhance nutrient absorption, ensuring that your body effectively utilizes these essential amino acids. AstraGin® has been clinically shown to increase the absorption of amino acids, making Absolute Amino more effective in supporting muscle recovery and growth.

By incorporating AstraGin®, Absolute Amino not only delivers the necessary amino acids but also ensures they are absorbed efficiently, providing maximum benefits. Experience faster recovery times, sustained energy, and optimal muscle-building support with Absolute Amino.

product.title: Nutricon Blown Non-Stim Pump Pre-Workout
product.description: Here is why you need Blown!Blown is engineered for peak performance and muscle cell hyperemia during training, enhancing recovery after intense exercise. Free from stimulants that cause vasoconstriction, disrupt sleep, and trigger anxiety or jitters, Blown is ideal for those seeking the ultimate pump to maximize training output and create the perfect environment for muscle growth and recovery.Blown’s prime ingredients enhance blood flow to working muscles, facilitating the removal of waste products and training metabolites that hinder performance and cause fatigue. This improved circulation allows oxygen and essential nutrients to be more effectively delivered to working muscles, boosting power output, strength, endurance, and recovery.Formulated to be versatile, Blown can be “doubled up” for a more intense training experience or mixed with our revolutionary Pre Erupt pre-workout formula for an added edge. Achieve a truly “BLOWN-Up” experience with Blown.
product.description_html:
Here is why you need Blown!

Blown is engineered for peak performance and muscle cell hyperemia during training, enhancing recovery after intense exercise. Free from stimulants that cause vasoconstriction, disrupt sleep, and trigger anxiety or jitters, Blown is ideal for those seeking the ultimate pump to maximize training output and create the perfect environment for muscle growth and recovery.

Blown’s prime ingredients enhance blood flow to working muscles, facilitating the removal of waste products and training metabolites that hinder performance and cause fatigue. This improved circulation allows oxygen and essential nutrients to be more effectively delivered to working muscles, boosting power output, strength, endurance, and recovery.

Formulated to be versatile, Blown can be “doubled up” for a more intense training experience or mixed with our revolutionary Pre Erupt pre-workout formula for an added edge. Achieve a truly “BLOWN-Up” experience with Blown.

product.title: Nutricon Erupt Pre-workout Powder
product.description: What makes Erupt the best on the market?Erupt Pre-Workout: Unleash Unstoppable Energy and FocusErupt is engineered to supercharge your workout, combining cutting-edge ingredients to amplify energy, endurance, and mental clarity. With a powerful blend of performance-enhancing compounds, Erupt helps you crush every training session and reach new peaks.At its core, L-Citrulline Malate and AAKG work together to boost nitric oxide levels, improving blood flow for intense muscle pumps and enhanced endurance. Beta-Alanine further supports stamina by buffering muscle acidity, helping you power through even the toughest sets without early fatigue.For peak mental performance, Alpha GPC and Huperzine A are included to sharpen focus and heighten the mind-muscle connection. Together, they ensure each movement is precise and powerful. A precisely dosed amount of Caffeine rounds out the formula, providing an explosive burst of energy to keep you motivated and alert from start to finish.Erupt isn’t just a pre-workout; it’s your ultimate performance partner, helping you train harder, last longer, and stay laser-focused. Get ready to ignite your potential, conquer your goals, and leave limitations behind with Erupt.
product.description_html:
What makes Erupt the best on the market?

Erupt Pre-Workout: Unleash Unstoppable Energy and Focus

Erupt is engineered to supercharge your workout, combining cutting-edge ingredients to amplify energy, endurance, and mental clarity. With a powerful blend of performance-enhancing compounds, Erupt helps you crush every training session and reach new peaks.

At its core, L-Citrulline Malate and AAKG work together to boost nitric oxide levels, improving blood flow for intense muscle pumps and enhanced endurance. Beta-Alanine further supports stamina by buffering muscle acidity, helping you power through even the toughest sets without early fatigue.

For peak mental performance, Alpha GPC and Huperzine A are included to sharpen focus and heighten the mind-muscle connection. Together, they ensure each movement is precise and powerful. A precisely dosed amount of Caffeine rounds out the formula, providing an explosive burst of energy to keep you motivated and alert from start to finish.

Erupt isn’t just a pre-workout; it’s your ultimate performance partner, helping you train harder, last longer, and stay laser-focused. Get ready to ignite your potential, conquer your goals, and leave limitations behind with Erupt.

product.title: Nutricon Whey + Isolate Protein Powder
product.description: Why Choose Whey+Isolate Protein?Nutricon Whey + Isolate is a quality Whey Protein which has been instantized for easy mixing and formulated for great taste. This product contains no added fats and low carbohydrates which makes it the ideal choice for adding lean muscle-building protein into your diet.Nutricon Whey + Isolate Protein is rich in Glutamine and Branched Chain Amino Acids (BCAA’s) which accelerate recovery from intense training. Nutricon Whey + Isolate has been scientifically manufactured using low temperature filtration technology which preserves the integrity of the protein while avoiding denaturation. This ensures that the Whey Protein micro fractions remain biologically active, so that the user will reap the immuno-enhancing, muscle building benefits inherent in this amazing product.Feel free to peruse our ingredient and amino acid profile for complete, open and honest transparency. No amino spiking! Only the very best and most ideal essential and conditionally essential amino acid ratios are provided, in each and every serving
product.description_html:
Why Choose Whey+Isolate Protein?

Nutricon Whey + Isolate is a quality Whey Protein which has been instantized for easy mixing and formulated for great taste. This product contains no added fats and low carbohydrates which makes it the ideal choice for adding lean muscle-building protein into your diet.

Nutricon Whey + Isolate Protein is rich in Glutamine and Branched Chain Amino Acids (BCAA’s) which accelerate recovery from intense training. Nutricon Whey + Isolate has been scientifically manufactured using low temperature filtration technology which preserves the integrity of the protein while avoiding denaturation. This ensures that the Whey Protein micro fractions remain biologically active, so that the user will reap the immuno-enhancing, muscle building benefits inherent in this amazing product.

Feel free to peruse our ingredient and amino acid profile for complete, open and honest transparency. No amino spiking! Only the very best and most ideal essential and conditionally essential amino acid ratios are provided, in each and every serving

product.title: 226ers Isotonic Gel
product.description: This isotonic gel is an energy gel in which the main source of carbohydrates is cyclodextrin, a cutting-edge carbohydrate that provides improved and more efficient glycogen replenishment. > It provides prolonged energy release, which is ideal during and after exercise. > A lower insulin peak, favouring the use of glucose at cellular level over a shorter timespan while maintaining the blood sugar level for longer. > Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolality, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. > Does not inhibit fat burning. Its main characteristic is that no water is required for its intake since the gel contains the necessary amount for its consumption. In a 68g, 89-kcal stick format, it contains 22g of carbohydrates per unit, of which practically the entirety are complex hydrates and only 1.4 g is sugar. Formulated with natural aromas for better assimilation and very natural flavors, Isotonic Gel is available in a wide range of varieties and flavors: The aromas used are natural and achieve really good flavours: > Pure formule: Lime and Watermelon. > Caffeine: Cola with 100mg of caffeine. > ICE: Contain menthol, a precursor to sensation of cold: Mint and Blueberry Mint. Oral administration of menthol stimulates the palatine and trigeminal nerves, improving thermal comfort as it reduces the sensation of suffocation and causes a feeling of well-being, as well as freshness while we breathe. All these adjustments in temperature perception improve performance.
product.description_html: This isotonic gel is an energy gel in which the main source of carbohydrates is cyclodextrin, a cutting-edge carbohydrate that provides improved and more efficient glycogen replenishment. > It provides prolonged energy release, which is ideal during and after exercise. > A lower insulin peak, favouring the use of glucose at cellular level over a shorter timespan while maintaining the blood sugar level for longer. > Rapid gastric emptying thanks to its high molecular weight and low osmolality, favouring digestion and reducing secondary gastrointestinal effects. > Does not inhibit fat burning. Its main characteristic is that no water is required for its intake since the gel contains the necessary amount for its consumption. In a 68g, 89-kcal stick format, it contains 22g of carbohydrates per unit, of which practically the entirety are complex hydrates and only 1.4 g is sugar. Formulated with natural aromas for better assimilation and very natural flavors, Isotonic Gel is available in a wide range of varieties and flavors: The aromas used are natural and achieve really good flavours: > Pure formule: Lime and Watermelon. > Caffeine: Cola with 100mg of caffeine. > ICE: Contain menthol, a precursor to sensation of cold: Mint and Blueberry Mint. Oral administration of menthol stimulates the palatine and trigeminal nerves, improving thermal comfort as it reduces the sensation of suffocation and causes a feeling of well-being, as well as freshness while we breathe. All these adjustments in temperature perception improve performance.

product.title: Science in Sport GO Isotonic Energy Gel
product.description: The GO Isotonic Energy Gel is formulated to rapidly delivers 22g of carbohydrate as a source of fast acting energy when you need it most.Easily digestible by the stomach providing energy fastNo need for additional waterConvenient form-factor for versatile fuellingA liquid carbohydrate energy gel created using maltodextrin<Officially the World's first Isotonic Energy Gel and Winner of the Queen’s Award for Enterprise in 2015. It continues to be a go-to energy source for elite athletes worldwide.WHY CHOOSE?Used as part of your fuelling strategy, the GO Isotonic Energy Gel can help you maintain your pace for longerIsotonic formula means no need for additional water or fluidsEasily & quickly absorbed by the stomach, providing energy fastNo artificial flavoursSUGGESTED USEDepending on your sport or event, you should aim to consume 1-3+ gels every hour to reach a 60g-90g target intake.(Tear off the top of the packaging and squeeze the contents into your mouth as and when required.)
product.description_html:
The GO Isotonic Energy Gel is formulated to rapidly delivers 22g of carbohydrate as a source of fast acting energy when you need it most.

Easily digestible by the stomach providing energy fast

No need for additional water

Convenient form-factor for versatile fuelling

A liquid carbohydrate energy gel created using maltodextrin<

Officially the World's first Isotonic Energy Gel and Winner of the Queen’s Award for Enterprise in 2015. It continues to be a go-to energy source for elite athletes worldwide.

WHY CHOOSE?

Used as part of your fuelling strategy, the GO Isotonic Energy Gel can help you maintain your pace for longer

Isotonic formula means no need for additional water or fluids

Easily & quickly absorbed by the stomach, providing energy fast

No artificial flavours

SUGGESTED USE

Depending on your sport or event, you should aim to consume 1-3+ gels every hour to reach a 60g-90g target intake.

(Tear off the top of the packaging and squeeze the contents into your mouth as and when required.)

product.title: Science in Sport GO Energy + Caffeine Gel
product.description: A convenient and fast-acting source of 22g liquid carbohydrate with added caffeineMinimal gastrointestinal discomfortCaffeine provides extra focus and alertness when fatiguedCaffeine reduces perceived effort levelsConvenient form-factor for versatile fuellingWHY CHOOSE?Used as part of your fuelling strategy, the GO Isotonic Energy Gel can help you maintain your pace for longerAdded 75mg caffeine provides a mental boost to enhance focus and alertness22g of carbohydrate per gelEasily digested energy with minimal GI discomfortSUGGESTED USEGO Energy + Caffeine Gel can be consumed 30-minutes before intense exercise for mental preparation. A further one or two gels can be consumed towards the end of your endurance exercise period when you feel you need a physical boost or to improve alertness and concentration.(Simply tear off the top of the sachet and squeeze the gel directly into your mouth.)
product.description_html:
A convenient and fast-acting source of 22g liquid carbohydrate with added caffeine

Minimal gastrointestinal discomfort

Caffeine provides extra focus and alertness when fatigued

Caffeine reduces perceived effort levels

Convenient form-factor for versatile fuelling

WHY CHOOSE?

Used as part of your fuelling strategy, the GO Isotonic Energy Gel can help you maintain your pace for longer

Added 75mg caffeine provides a mental boost to enhance focus and alertness

22g of carbohydrate per gel

Easily digested energy with minimal GI discomfort

SUGGESTED USE

GO Energy + Caffeine Gel can be consumed 30-minutes before intense exercise for mental preparation. A further one or two gels can be consumed towards the end of your endurance exercise period when you feel you need a physical boost or to improve alertness and concentration.

(Simply tear off the top of the sachet and squeeze the gel directly into your mouth.)

product.title: Science in Sport Beta Recovery
product.description: BETA Recovery is an advanced carbohydrate & protein blend, scientifically formulated to support endurance athletes who require a complete recovery solution to ensure they are fully recovered before the next session.Dual-source carbohydrate, with 1:1 ratio of maltodextrin to fructoseProvides the amino acids needed to promote muscle repair & maintenanceScientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storageSupports digestive health, immune health, and protein absorptionAfter a hard session, your muscles and liver are likely depleted in glycogen. Fructose promotes recovery of liver glycogen stores, whereas maltodextrin can be directly taken up the muscle to replenish muscle glycogen stores.(Scientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storage.)WHY CHOOSE?Supports recovery after prolonged moderate to high-intensity endurance exerciseAids the recovery of muscle function and rebuilding before your next sessionA 60 g dual-source carbohydrate blend of a 1:1 ratio of fructose and maltodextrin, scientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storageA 30 g serving of protein, with 3 g of Leucine, promotes muscle growth and maintenanceSUGGESTED USEAdd 100g of powder (three full scoops) to 500ml cold water and shake. Best consumed within 30 minutes post-exercise.(Muscle and liver glycogen storage is more rapid if carbohydrate is consumed in the immediate post-exercise period.)
product.description_html:
BETA Recovery is an advanced carbohydrate & protein blend, scientifically formulated to support endurance athletes who require a complete recovery solution to ensure they are fully recovered before the next session.

Dual-source carbohydrate, with 1:1 ratio of maltodextrin to fructose

Provides the amino acids needed to promote muscle repair & maintenance

Scientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storage

Supports digestive health, immune health, and protein absorption

After a hard session, your muscles and liver are likely depleted in glycogen. Fructose promotes recovery of liver glycogen stores, whereas maltodextrin can be directly taken up the muscle to replenish muscle glycogen stores.

(Scientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storage.)

WHY CHOOSE?

Supports recovery after prolonged moderate to high-intensity endurance exercise

Aids the recovery of muscle function and rebuilding before your next session

A 60 g dual-source carbohydrate blend of a 1:1 ratio of fructose and maltodextrin, scientifically proven to promote both liver and muscle glycogen storage

A 30 g serving of protein, with 3 g of Leucine, promotes muscle growth and maintenance

SUGGESTED USE

Add 100g of powder (three full scoops) to 500ml cold water and shake. Best consumed within 30 minutes post-exercise.

(Muscle and liver glycogen storage is more rapid if carbohydrate is consumed in the immediate post-exercise period.)

product.title: Science in Sport Beta Fuel Powder Sachet
product.description: BETA - the most complete nutrition solution in endurance sport. BETA FUEL 80 is a dual source, high-carbohydrate energy mix that combines with water to deliver more energy for athletes undertaking longer sessions.Contains 80g dual-source carbohydrateAdvanced 1:0.8 ratio of maltodextrin and fructoseA superior fuelling solution for exercise > 2 hoursReduces GI discomfort during loading or fuellingWHY CHOOSE?Designed for endurance fuelling80g of dual source carbohydrates per serving in an optimal ratio of 1:0.8 Maltodextrin to FructoseNeutral pH & isotonic formula minimising gastrointestinal discomfort

Each fruit-flavoured serving provides 20 grams of high biological value protein from premium whey protein isolate and hydrolysed collagen peptides. With added vitamin C, only 100 calories per serving, and zero sugar, carbs, fat, colourants or preservatives, this great tasting, ready-to-go protein drink provides convenience and satisfaction in your efforts to meet your daily protein requirements.

product.title: Skratch Labs Super High Carb Drink Mix
product.description: Super High-Carb Sport Drink Mix is designed to solve a prevalent problem for endurance athletes: fueling for big days of training or racing when preparing or carrying real food isn’t possible. Super High-Carb is powered by Cluster Dextrin™, a highly-complex carbohydrate that digests easily and steadily, like real food. One serving of Super High-Carb provides 100g of carbohydrates and 400 calories of energy.

product.description: Timing is everything when it comes to recovery. So, when athletes need something convenient to eat and drink immediately after they’ve emptied the tank, our Recovery Sport Drink Mix is an easy choice. product.title: 32Gi Race Bar
product.description: 32Gi’s Race Pro Nougat Energy Bar is nutritionally engineered to provide sustainable energy with a terrifically tasty boutique nougat taste.mmediate and sustained energy - Formulated with natural ingredients to ensure stable energy levels for hours on end. These bars have all the carbs you need. Source of protein - Easily absorbing high-quality protein to aid energy stability & reduce the risks of muscle fatigue. Source of healthy unsaturated fat - An additional energy source and hunger suppressant. Easy on the tummy - Race Pro Nougat Energy Bars are designed for digestive comfort and to minimize gastric distress. Delicious tasting - Our Race Pro Nougat Energy Bars are available in three terrific flavours. The perfect size - Sized for easy handling. Whether you are retrieving them from a backpack during a run, or a jersey pocket on a ride. Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. product.description_html:

mmediate and sustained energy - Formulated with natural ingredients to ensure stable energy levels for hours on end. These bars have all the carbs you need.

product.title: Styrkr SLT +
product.description: STYRKR SLT+ is a high-strength electrolyte supplement engineered for endurance athletes facing heavy sweat loss, tough race conditions and high-heat environments. Each single-serve sachet delivers an elite-level 1080mg of sodium along with research-backed doses of potassium, magnesium and calcium — the four essential minerals required to maintain hydration, support muscle function reduce fatigue and promote faster recovery.Created through years of testing and refined with feedback from elite athletes, SLT+ provides powerful hydration and a refreshing natural Orange flavour. Perfect for racing, long training days and hot climates.Informed Sport certified and free from banned substances, STYRKR SLT+ gives you total confidence in what you put into your body. Strong, clean and built for endurance — hydration that works as hard as you do
product.description_html:
STYRKR SLT+  is a high-strength electrolyte supplement engineered for endurance athletes facing heavy sweat loss, tough race conditions and high-heat environments. Each single-serve sachet delivers an elite-level 1080mg of sodium along with research-backed doses of potassium, magnesium and calcium — the four essential minerals required to maintain hydration, support muscle function reduce fatigue and promote faster recovery.

Created through years of testing and refined with feedback from elite athletes, SLT+ provides powerful hydration and a refreshing natural Orange flavour. Perfect for racing, long training days and hot climates.

Informed Sport certified and free from banned substances, STYRKR SLT+ gives you total confidence in what you put into your body. Strong, clean and built for endurance — hydration that works as hard as you do

product.title: Blast Daily Hydrate
product.description: The All-in-one hydration drink with a scientifically balanced formula of electrolytes and essential amino acids. BLAST™ Daily Hydration is a complete sports drink for the demanding athlete. Perfect for Cycling, Running, Gym Workouts, Swimming, or any activity that causes a lot of muscle strain and dehydration. Electrolytes support endurance: last longer, go further, go harder. Essential Amino Acids promote recovery, and build muscle. Can help repair muscle damage from prolonged and extreme sports & fitness activities. 330g (30 x 11g Servings)
product.description_html: The All-in-one hydration drink with a scientifically balanced formula of electrolytes and essential amino acids. BLAST™ Daily Hydration is a complete sports drink for the demanding athlete. Perfect for Cycling, Running, Gym Workouts, Swimming, or any activity that causes a lot of muscle strain and dehydration. product.title: Blast Daily Protein Tub
product.description: BLAST™ Daily Protein combines pea and rice protein and offers a balanced amino acid profile, making it comparable to animal-based proteins. Pea protein is rich in lysine, while rice protein provides cysteine and methionine. Together, they complement each other, aiding in muscle recovery, weight management, and supporting overall health. This blend is also suitable for those with dietary restrictions, such as vegans or individuals with lactose intolerance.

This blend is also suitable for those with dietary restrictions, such as vegans or individuals with lactose intolerance.
