product.title: PVM Fusion Mass
product.description: SUPPORTS INCREASES & MAINTENANCE OF LEAN MUSCLE MASS• Lean body mass can be maximally increased when resistance training is combined with high protein and energy intake. This high protein, lower carbohydrate meal replacement assists with gains in lean muscle mass, reduction in body fat and strength increases • Combination of 6 different high quality protein sources including whey protein isolate, egg albumen and calcium caseinate • Provides a precision and continuous release of amino acids for sustained, and maximized, muscle protein synthesis • Contains anabolic BCAA’s and cell volumising amino acids • Key ingredients support the immune system: L-glutamine, arginine, pre-biotic fiber (inulin), vitamins and minerals • High in vitamins and minerals: Contains ± ⅓ of total daily requirements • 33g Protein and 7g glutamine per serving • 18 amino acids

Beneficial properties • Boost sustained workout intensity • Promotes increased strength and explosive power • Potent post-workout anabolic activator for rapid glycogen and muscle recovery and growth • Optimal creatine form (100% bio-available creatine monohydrate), delivery and absorption • 20% Protein including scientifically proven whey protein peptides and BCAA’s • Contains potent cell-volumisers and pH buffering agents (lactic acid burn inhibitors) • Contains L-arginine (produces Nitric Oxide for increased blood flow), electrolytes, B- alanine and L-glutamine
product.description_html: POWERFUL CREATINE TRANSPORTER, INCREASED MUSCLE MASS & STRENGTH, ANABOLIC RECOVERY. product.title: Enduren Zero Sports Drink Mix
product.description: By using dried naartjie to flavour and stevia leaves to sweeten, Enduren have developed their first all-natural, zero sugar, zero calorie sports drink. The refreshing flavour combined with Enduren's proven sport salts combination and additional sodium is a tasty way to hydrate, balance electrolytes, alleviate fatigue, and inhibit cramps. Can be used before, during and after activity to hydrate or as a guilt free everyday drink. Ideal if you are following a low sugar, low carb or banting diet

product.title: 32Gi Race Pro Drink
product.description: An uncomplicated fuelling strategy that will see you finish your race feeling strong and absolutely satiated! 32Gi® Race Pro is so easy on the gut you would hardly believe you had been pushing yourself for so long! To top it all off, it will enhance your recovery post-exercise. Simplify your fuelling strategy - Single-source energy feed nothing else needed. Tummy friendly - Say goodbye to GI distress. Immediate energy with one of the highest gastric emptying rates of all carbohydrates = lowered risk of GI distress. Finish feeling strong not drained - 9 out of 10 athletes report feeling no lack of energy or hunger post-exercise. Reduce the risk of muscle fatigue - Perfectly formulated with BCAA's from a high quality plant-based (pea) protein source to reduce the risk of muscle fatigue (due to gluconeogenesis) with longer exercise duration. feel immediate energy & stability - The addition of Cluster DextrinTM - being the fastest absorbing carbohydrate (substantially faster than maltodextrin) - allows for incredible energy within moments of consumption. Multi-transportable carbohydrates - For better absorption and digestive comfort. Including PalatinoseTM - a natural occurring carbohydrate that stretches the power curve and enables a balanced, sustained supply of energy. Zero banned substances - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. No artificial additives promise - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Race Pro has no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND is gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free

An uncomplicated fuelling strategy that will see you finish your race feeling strong and absolutely satiated! 32Gi® Race Pro is so easy on the gut you would hardly believe you had been pushing yourself for so long! To top it all off, it will enhance your recovery post-exercise.

Multi-transportable carbohydrates - For better absorption and digestive comfort. Including PalatinoseTM - a natural occurring carbohydrate that stretches the power curve and enables a balanced, sustained supply of energy.

product.title: NeverSecond C30 Sports Drink Variety Pack
product.description: Our C30 Sports Drink redefines what a sport drink should be. A lightly flavored 2:1 glucose-to-fructose drink mix with a light refreshing flavor and neutral pH. Each serving delivers 30g of fast-absorbing energy and 200mg of sodium. C30 Sports Drink contains only what you need, in precise proportion, for optimal performance. Our C30 Variety Pack contains three (3) servings each of Citrus and Forest Berry flavors.

This bar is low in fat, fiber and protein, allowing it to absorb quickly with a low risk of stomach problems

product.title: 32Gi Boom Pre-Workout
product.description: 32Gi Boom is a pre-workout for endurance athletes designed to improve mental and physical focus to bolster performance. 32Gi BOOM contains clean proven ingredients.Increased Nitric Oxide Production - Widening of blood vessels, improves nutrient transportation, blood flow, and oxygen uptake. Improved Endurance - Athletes experience increased exercise efficiency with increased time to exhaustion, anaerobic threshold, and maximum oxygen uptake (VO2 max). Improved Mental Focus - Negate mental fatigue and its negatively impact on athletic performance, specifically on cognitive and physical performance. Improved Nutrient Transportation - BOOM contains vasodilators that improves the rate at which much needed nutrients are transported to the muscles. This improves recovery and performance. Decreased Rate of Perceived Exertion - BOOM contains stimulants to reduce the rate of perceived exertion. This allows your body to perceive tiredness differently, allowing you to go longer and harder before fatiguing. Increased Strength - Citrulline, is a key ingredient that allows the muscles to adapt to training faster, increasing muscle strength.
product.description_html:
32Gi Boom is a pre-workout for endurance athletes designed to improve mental and physical focus to bolster performance. 32Gi BOOM contains clean proven ingredients.Increased Nitric Oxide Production -

Widening of blood vessels, improves nutrient transportation, blood flow, and oxygen uptake. I

mproved Endurance - Athletes experience increased exercise efficiency with increased time to exhaustion, anaerobic threshold, and maximum oxygen uptake (VO2 max). I

mproved Mental Focus - Negate mental fatigue and its negatively impact on athletic performance, specifically on cognitive and physical performance.

Improved Nutrient Transportation - BOOM contains vasodilators that improves the rate at which much needed nutrients are transported to the muscles. This improves recovery and performance.

Decreased Rate of Perceived Exertion - BOOM contains stimulants to reduce the rate of perceived exertion. This allows your body to perceive tiredness differently, allowing you to go longer and harder before fatiguing.

Increased Strength - Citrulline, is a key ingredient that allows the muscles to adapt to training faster, increasing muscle strength.

product.title: 32Gi Chews
product.description: 32Gi® Sports Chews are designed for easy swallowing, hot or cold weather, and are not too sweet with their subtle natural & delicious flavours. 2-HOURS OF STABLE LOW GI ENERGY - Energy-dense calorie packed in each portable Chews packet helps to sustain stable energy demands of long duration activities.REPLACE YOUR GELS - Easy to eat, will not get stuck in your teeth or block your airways. 32Gi® Sports Chews are the perfect companion for the run, bike, or anywhere on the go.NO MELTING = NO MESS - Can be removed from packaging before an event = Convenient to access.DEVELOPED AROUND THE BANANA - The banana for years has been considered a great endurance fuel (but not that convenient as you can imagine), 32Gi® Sports Chews has emulated the sugar response, and caloric values of 2 ripe medium sized bananas.MULTI-TRANSPORTABLE CARBOHYDRATES – Stable energy with PalatinoseTM and other carbs to deliver ready to use energy and delay bonking by sparing glycogen, which the body can quickly turn into fuel when needed.ZERO BANNED SUBSTANCES - We are fully compliant with WADA standards. NO ARTIFICIAL ADDITIVES PROMISE - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Sports Chews have no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND are gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free
product.description_html:
32Gi® Sports Chews are designed for easy swallowing, hot or cold weather, and are not too sweet with their subtle natural & delicious flavours. 2-HOURS OF STABLE LOW GI ENERGY - Energy-dense calorie packed in each portable Chews packet helps to sustain stable energy demands of long duration activities.

REPLACE YOUR GELS - Easy to eat, will not get stuck in your teeth or block your airways. 32Gi® Sports Chews are the perfect companion for the run, bike, or anywhere on the go.

NO MELTING = NO MESS - Can be removed from packaging before an event = Convenient to access.

DEVELOPED AROUND THE BANANA - The banana for years has been considered a great endurance fuel (but not that convenient as you can imagine), 32Gi® Sports Chews has emulated the sugar response, and caloric values of 2 ripe medium sized bananas.

MULTI-TRANSPORTABLE CARBOHYDRATES – Stable energy with PalatinoseTM and other carbs to deliver ready to use energy and delay bonking by sparing glycogen, which the body can quickly turn into fuel when needed.

ZERO BANNED SUBSTANCES - We are fully compliant with WADA standards.

NO ARTIFICIAL ADDITIVES PROMISE - Rest easy knowing that 32Gi® Sports Chews have no artificial sweeteners, flavours or colours, AND are gluten, dairy, soy and GMO free
